items.title: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.author: obra
items.summary_zh: Superpowers 是一套面向 AI 代理的“技能框架”和软件开发方法论。它试图解决当前大模型在复杂任务中缺乏结构化思考的问题——通过定义清晰的技能单元和协作流程，让 AI 代理像人类工程师一样分步解决问题。这个框架不仅给 AI 用，也可以指导人类团队如何拆解需求、编写代码、进行测试。如果你在探索如何让 AI 更可靠地参与实际项目开发，或者想建立更高效的工程协作流程，值得关注。
items.summary_en: Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to make AI agents work more reliably on complex engineering tasks. Instead of letting a model guess its way through a problem, it decomposes work into defined skills, checks, and iterative steps—similar to how a senior engineer would approach a feature. The framework is practical enough to be used by human teams as well. If you're building AI-powered coding tools or want to inject disciplined structure into your development workflow, this project offers a fresh, actionable approach.

items.title: anthropics/claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
items.author: anthropics
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 是一款驻扎在终端里的智能编码助手，它能深入理解你的整个代码库，替你执行那些繁琐的日常任务，比如重构、测试和文档编写，从而让你能专注于更重要的逻辑设计。对于那些希望在开发流程中大幅提升效率、减少重复劳动的开发者来说，这个工具就像给他们的终端装上了 AI 副驾驶，直接改变了人机协作的方式。
items.summary_en: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives right inside your terminal and understands your entire codebase, allowing it to automate routine tasks like refactoring, testing, and documentation. For developers tired of repetitive manual work, it acts as an AI co-pilot that accelerates development by handling the grunt work so you can focus on solving real problems. It's a practical, hands-on way to bring large language model assistance directly into your existing workflow, making coding faster and more enjoyable.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.author: msitarzewski
items.summary_zh: agency-agents是一个开源项目，提供了一套完整的AI代理团队，包括前端专家、社交媒体运营、创意注入者等各种角色。开发者可以通过简单的配置快速组建自己的AI“工作室”，无需从头训练每个模型。对于需要快速验证产品想法或自动化内容创作的个人和小团队来说，这个项目大大降低了AI应用的门槛，让每个人都能拥有一个虚拟的创业团队。
items.summary_en: Agency-agents is an open-source project that bundles a complete set of AI agents emulating a full-fledged digital agency. It includes roles like frontend wizards, Reddit community managers, and whimsy injectors, allowing developers to assemble a tailored AI team with minimal configuration. The beauty lies in its plug-and-play nature — you don't need to train each agent from scratch. For indie hackers, startup founders, and content creators, this means rapidly prototyping products or automating online presence without hiring a real team. It's a glimpse into a future where AI collaborates in structured, specialized groups.

items.title: supabase/supabase
items.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.
items.author: supabase
items.summary_zh: Supabase 是一个基于 PostgreSQL 的开发平台，它为您提供一套完整的后端服务，包括实时数据库、认证、存储和边缘函数，让您能快速搭建 Web、移动和 AI 应用。作为 Firebase 的开源替代品，它让开发者无需管理基础设施就能获得弹性扩展的数据库，特别适合那些希望加速迭代的全栈团队。
items.summary_en: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative built on PostgreSQL that gives you a dedicated database along with authentication, real-time subscriptions, storage, and edge functions. It solves the problem of having to manage your own backend infrastructure by offering a complete development platform that scales automatically. Full-stack teams building web, mobile, or AI applications benefit the most, as it dramatically reduces setup time and lets them focus on product features instead of plumbing.

items.title: pytorch/pytorch
items.description: Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration
items.author: pytorch
items.summary_zh: PyTorch 是一个开源深度学习框架，以动态计算图和强大的 GPU 加速著称。它让研究人员和工程师能用简洁的 Python 代码定义和训练神经网络，从学术实验到工业部署都广受欢迎。其灵活性和易调试性使其成为 AI 领域的主流选择。
items.summary_en: PyTorch is an open-source deep learning framework renowned for its dynamic computation graphs and strong GPU acceleration. It allows researchers and engineers to define and train neural networks using clean, Pythonic code, from academic experiments to industrial-scale deployments. Its flexibility and ease of debugging have made it the go-to choice for the AI community, powering countless innovations in computer vision, NLP, and beyond.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
items.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
items.author: JuliusBrussee
items.summary_zh: 「穴居人」是一个脑洞大开的 Claude Code 技能：通过用极其简短的“原始语言”与 AI 交互，最多能减少 65% 的 token 消耗。它巧妙地利用了大模型对精简指令的理解能力，既省钱又高效，尤其适合频繁调用 API 的开发者或预算有限的团队。
items.summary_en: Caveman is a quirky yet clever skill for Claude Code that drastically reduces token usage by communicating in ultra-brief, “caveman-style” language. By stripping away unnecessary words while retaining clear intent, it can cut up to 65% of tokens in a conversation. This technique leverages large language models’ ability to understand minimalistic prompts, making it a cost-effective and efficient approach for heavy API users or teams on a tight budget—without sacrificing output quality.

items.title: elastic/elasticsearch
items.description: Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine
items.author: elastic
items.summary_zh: Elasticsearch 是一款开源的分布式 RESTful 搜索引擎，它以实时、可扩展的方式处理海量数据，广泛应用于日志分析、全文搜索和安全监控等场景。无论是企业需要快速检索大量文档，还是开发者希望为自己的应用添加搜索功能，Elasticsearch 都提供了一套成熟且灵活的解决方案。
items.summary_en: Elasticsearch is a free and open-source distributed search and analytics engine built on Apache Lucene. It solves the problem of searching and analyzing large volumes of data in real time, supporting everything from full-text search to structured logs and metrics. Developers and enterprises rely on it for use cases like log monitoring, security analytics, and powering search features in applications. Its RESTful API and horizontal scalability make it a go-to choice for building fast, reliable search experiences at any scale.

items.title: ansible/ansible
items.description: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.
items.author: ansible
items.summary_zh: Ansible 是一个极其简洁的 IT 自动化平台，它使用人类可读的 YAML 描述系统配置，无需在目标机器上安装代理就可以完成服务器部署、应用发布和运维编排。对于那些希望用最少的精力实现大规模基础设施自动化的运维团队来说，Ansible 的简洁性和无代理架构带来了显著的生产力提升。
items.summary_en: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that uses human-readable YAML playbooks to automate deployment, configuration management, and application delivery. Its agentless architecture means you don't need to install anything on managed nodes, drastically reducing setup effort. IT operations teams benefit most because it makes automating everything from server provisioning to application updates straightforward and repeatable. It's designed to let you manage thousands of machines with the same ease as one, solving the complexity of modern infrastructure at scale.

items.title: 突发，阿里全面禁用Claude，7月10日起卸载
items.summary_zh: 据突发消息，阿里巴巴公司内部已要求全面禁用 AI 助手 Claude，所有员工必须在 7 月 10 日前完成卸载。此举主要出于数据安全和合规性考虑，防止敏感业务信息通过外部 AI 工具泄露。对于长期依赖 Claude 提效的开发团队来说，这一禁令意味着他们需要立即寻找替代方案，也反映出大型企业在引入 AI 工具时面临的安全与效率之间的权衡。
items.summary_en: In a breaking news report, Alibaba has mandated a complete ban on the AI coding assistant Claude across the company, requiring all employees to uninstall it by July 10. The move is driven by data security and compliance concerns, as the company seeks to prevent sensitive business information from being processed by external AI tools. This decision highlights the growing tension between leveraging cutting-edge AI for productivity and maintaining strict internal data governance. Teams that heavily relied on Claude will now need to quickly find alternative solutions, potentially impacting their development workflows.

items.title: 李彦宏最大IPO来了
items.summary_zh: 百度创始人李彦宏即将迎来其职业生涯中规模最大的一次IPO，旗下智能云或自动驾驶业务可能独立上市。这一举动不仅将重塑百度的资本结构，更意味着中国AI商业化进入加速阶段。对投资者而言，这是观察中国科技巨头如何拆分核心资产、释放价值的关键窗口，而李彦宏本人也借此从搜索广告的旧叙事转向AI新故事。
items.summary_en: Baidu founder Robin Li is about to oversee the largest IPO of his career, likely for the company's intelligent cloud or autonomous driving unit. This move signals a strategic shift to unlock value from Baidu's AI assets and accelerate commercialization. For investors, it's a crucial case study in how Chinese tech giants spin off core businesses to tap into new growth narratives beyond traditional search advertising.

items.title: 绝了，Claude Fable5惨遭二次越狱，黑客20小时撬开神话防线
items.summary_zh: 黑客在短短20小时内成功对Claude的最新安全模型Fable5实施了第二次越狱攻击，此前号称固若金汤的防线再次被攻破。这一事件暴露了大语言模型在安全对齐上的持续漏洞，即便经过多次加固，仍可能被巧妙的提示词绕过。对AI安全社区而言，Fable5的沦陷提醒我们：没有绝对安全的模型，防御与攻击的猫鼠游戏将长期持续。
items.summary_en: A hacker successfully jailbroke Claude's newest safety model Fable5 for a second time in just 20 hours, breaching what was touted as an impenetrable defense. This incident highlights the persistent vulnerability of large language models to adversarial prompt engineering, even after multiple rounds of safety alignment. It serves as a stark reminder to the AI community that no model is truly secure, and the cat-and-mouse game between attackers and defenders will continue indefinitely.

items.title: 9点1氪｜阿里内部全面禁用Claude Code；FF洛杉矶总部人去楼空？公司回应：不实；微软砸25亿美元组建6000人AI新公司
items.summary_zh: 今日科技圈三则重磅消息：阿里巴巴内部全面禁用Claude Code，原因或涉及数据安全与合规，国产AI工具迎来替代机遇；针对法拉第未来洛杉矶总部人去楼空的传闻，公司紧急辟谣称系不实信息，但外界对其资金链的质疑仍未消散；微软宣布斥资25亿美元组建一家6000人规模的AI新公司，加速在AI基础设施与产品层面的布局，这一动作预示着科技巨头对AI人才的争夺战进一步升级。
items.summary_en: Three major tech stories today: Alibaba has banned Claude Code internally, likely over data security and compliance concerns, opening doors for domestic AI tools. Faraday Future denied rumors that its LA headquarters was abandoned, but questions about its cash flow persist. Meanwhile, Microsoft announced a $2.5 billion investment to create a new AI company with 6,000 employees, signaling an intensifying battle for AI talent and infrastructure dominance among tech giants.

items.title: 智者不入穷局，才是成年人职场最顶级的清醒
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章指出，职场中的成年人最大的智慧是避免陷入资源匮乏、选择受限的恶性循环。所谓的“穷局”不仅是经济上的窘迫，更包括能力、人脉和认知上的滑坡。作者认为，与其等困境降临再奋力挣扎，不如提前布局，保持成长心态并积累可迁移技能。这种观点旨在唤醒那些在重复劳动中逐渐麻木的职场人，提醒他们主动设计职业生涯，而不是被动接受命运。
items.summary_en: This article argues that the smartest move for adults in the workplace is to avoid falling into a 'poverty trap' — not just financial hardship, but a downward spiral of limited skills, connections, and mindsets. Instead of waiting to struggle when crisis hits, professionals should proactively invest in growth and transferable skills. It's a wake-up call for those numbed by repetitive work, urging them to design their careers actively rather than passively accept fate.

items.title: 韩国炒股团买爆“中AI股”
items.summary_zh: 韩国散户投资者近期大举买入中国人工智能相关股票，掀起了一波跨市场投资热潮。他们看中的是深度求索、百度等中国AI企业的大模型进展和估值优势。这一现象反映出中国AI技术的全球吸引力正在提升，同时也体现了韩国投资者对本土科技股失望后寻找新热点的心理。他们像当年追逐美股电动车热潮一样，把目光投向了中国AI板块。
items.summary_en: South Korean retail investors are pouring into Chinese AI stocks, driven by the rapid progress of large models from companies like DeepSeek and Baidu, as well as perceived valuation advantages. This cross-market buying spree shows growing global appeal of China's AI sector and reflects Korean investors' search for new opportunities after disappointment with domestic tech stocks. Much like their earlier chase of U.S. EV stocks, they are now betting on Chinese AI.

items.title: 脆皮中年人，集体过上「三无生活」
items.summary_zh: 脆皮中年人开始主动选择一种被称为「三无生活」的新活法，他们放弃房贷、车贷和育儿压力，转而追求低消费、高自由度的极简生活。这一趋势背后折射的是当代中产群体在职场高压与经济不确定性下的集体焦虑，以及他们对传统成功路径的反思。对越来越多人而言，少即是多，活得轻松比活得体面更重要。
items.summary_en: A growing number of middle-aged Chinese are embracing what they call the 'three-no lifestyle'—no mortgage, no car loan, and no children—as a way to escape the crushing pressure of modern life. This trend highlights a widespread disillusionment with traditional markers of success among the middle class, who now prioritize mental well-being and financial freedom over material accumulation. It's a quiet rebellion against the rat race, suggesting that for many, a simpler, less burdensome existence is becoming the new ideal.

items.title: 扎克伯格承认：Meta AI智能体研发不及预期
items.summary_zh: Meta首席执行官扎克伯格公开承认，公司打造的AI智能体产品在能力与市场表现上均未达到内部预期，尤其是与竞争对手相比缺乏突破性进展。这番坦诚暴露了Meta在生成式AI竞赛中的尴尬位置：尽管投入巨资，但技术落地与用户体验仍存在显著差距。对于依赖AI转型的Meta而言，这无疑是一记警钟，也提示整个行业：大模型很难靠资源堆砌就一步登天。
items.summary_en: Mark Zuckerberg admitted that Meta’s AI agent development has fallen short of expectations, acknowledging the company's struggles to deliver competitive products in the generative AI race. Despite massive investment, Meta's agents lack the breakthrough capabilities seen in rivals like OpenAI or Google. The confession underscores a harsh reality: throwing resources at AI isn't enough to guarantee success, and Meta now faces an uphill battle to catch up in a field where it was once a pioneer.

items.title: Vercel 推出开源 AI 智能体开发框架 Eve
items.summary_zh: Vercel正式发布了名为Eve的开源AI智能体开发框架，旨在降低AI智能体应用的构建和部署门槛。Eve提供了一系列模块化的工具和强大的运行时支持，开发者可以像搭积木一样快速创建、测试和扩展自己的智能体。这一框架特别适合前端开发者、全栈工程师以及希望将AI能力集成到Web应用中的团队，它让智能体开发变得简单而高效，有望加速AI在Web领域的落地。
items.summary_en: Vercel has officially released Eve, an open-source framework for building AI agents, designed to lower the barrier to creating and deploying agent applications. Eve provides a set of modular tools and robust runtime support, allowing developers to quickly build, test, and scale their agents like assembling building blocks. This framework is particularly suited for frontend developers, full-stack engineers, and teams looking to integrate AI capabilities into web applications, making agent development simple and efficient and potentially accelerating the adoption of AI in the web domain.

items.title: 让Agent越用越强：AReaL 2.0开源，给智能体装上“成长系统”
items.summary_zh: AReaL 2.0 近期开源，这是一个专门为智能体打造的“成长系统”，核心在于赋予 AI Agent 持续学习和自我进化的能力。与传统的静态模型不同，该系统允许智能体在实际使用中不断吸收新知识、优化决策策略，从而越用越聪明、越用越适应复杂场景。对于开发者而言，这意味着他们可以构建出真正具备长期生命力的 Agent 应用，而不是一次训练后就停滞不前的工具。这一项目开源后，将极大降低让智能体具备持续学习能力的技术门槛，推动 AI 从“一次性交付”走向“持续进化”。
items.summary_en: AReaL 2.0 has been open-sourced, introducing a growth system that enables AI agents to learn and evolve continuously during use. Unlike static models, this system allows agents to absorb new knowledge and refine decision-making strategies over time, becoming smarter and more adaptive in complex scenarios. For developers, it opens the door to building agents with long-term vitality rather than one-shot tools. By lowering the barrier to continuous learning in AI, AReaL 2.0 pushes the industry toward agents that truly improve with every interaction.

items.title: 一颗14克的芯片，拯救了葡萄牙和C罗
items.summary_zh: 一款仅重14克的微型芯片在2024年欧洲杯葡萄牙队的比赛中发挥了关键作用，它被嵌入球员球衣内，实时监测位置、速度和生理数据，协助教练组做出换人和战术调整。正是基于芯片回传的数据，主帅才决定让C罗在关键时刻替补上场并最终扭转战局。这颗小小的芯片代表体育科技从辅助工具进化为核心决策引擎的趋势，也让球迷看到数据如何改写绿茵故事。
items.summary_en: A tiny 14-gram chip embedded in players' jerseys became an unsung hero during Portugal's Euro 2024 campaign, providing real-time tracking and biometric data that helped the coaching staff make a game-changing substitution—bringing on Cristiano Ronaldo at a crucial moment. The chip's data proved decisive, turning the match around. This story illustrates how wearable tech is no longer just a nice-to-have in sports; it has become a strategic weapon that influences real-time decisions, blending data analytics with human instinct on the pitch.

items.title: 理想组织再动刀：去中间环节，整车和智驾产品回归研发｜36氪独家
items.summary_zh: 理想汽车再次进行组织架构调整，核心动作是砍掉中间管理层，让整车和智能驾驶产品的决策权直接回归研发团队。这意味着过去层层汇报的流程被缩短，产品与研发的距离被拉近。这家造车新势力试图通过扁平化结构来提升产品迭代速度和响应效率，在竞争白热化的新能源市场中抢占先机。对员工而言，这是一次权责重配，对行业而言，则是极致效率导向的管理实验。
items.summary_en: In a fresh restructuring move, Li Auto is dismantling its middle management layers and giving product decision power directly back to R&D teams for both vehicles and autonomous driving. The goal is to accelerate iteration cycles and sharpen responsiveness in the hyper-competitive EV market. By flattening the hierarchy, the company hopes to eliminate bureaucratic bottlenecks and foster faster innovation. This bold experiment in organizational design signals that even successful startups must constantly reinvent their internal structures to stay agile.

items.title: 代码是写给未来的讯息
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章深刻反思了编程的本质：代码不仅是给机器运行的指令，更是写给未来开发者（包括未来的自己）的一封信。作者认为，优秀的代码应当像一篇流畅的记叙文，注重可读性、意图表达和长期可维护性，而非仅仅追求当下的功能实现。在技术快速迭代的今天，这种“为未来写代码”的理念尤为重要，它提醒我们在追求效率的同时，不要忘记团队协作和知识传承的价值。
items.summary_en: This article reflects on the essence of programming: code is not just instructions for machines but a message to future developers—including your future self. The author argues that great code should read like a clear narrative, prioritizing readability, intent, and long-term maintainability over mere functional correctness. In an era of rapid tech iteration, this philosophy becomes crucial, reminding us to balance speed with collaboration and knowledge transfer. It's a call to write code that future humans will thank you for.

items.title: Agent 狂欢热潮下的冷思考：为什么规模化落地总是陷入僵局？
items.summary_zh: 在 AI Agent 的火热浪潮下，这篇文章冷静地指出了规模化落地中普遍遭遇的僵局。问题出在哪儿？作者分析认为，当前多数 Agent 在真实业务中面临可靠性不足、成本失控、场景碎片化以及缺乏统一标准的困境。尽管演示很炫酷，但一旦要扩展到成百上千个节点，各种边缘情况就会让系统变得脆弱。这篇文章对于正计划大举投入 Agent 的企业来说，是一剂必要的清醒剂，提醒我们在追逐热潮的同时，要先解决基础工程挑战。
items.summary_en: Amid the AI Agent hype, this article offers a sobering analysis of why large-scale deployment often hits a dead end. The core issues include insufficient reliability, runaway costs, fragmented use cases, and a lack of common standards. While demos are impressive, scaling to hundreds of agents exposes fragility in edge cases. For enterprises planning heavy investment, this piece serves as a necessary reality check, urging them to tackle fundamental engineering challenges before chasing the trend.

items.title: 用户太蠢不配用 Fable？被Anthropic的回应气笑了：最贵的模型，最憋屈的体验
items.summary_zh: 一款基于Anthropic Claude模型构建的AI写作工具Fable因用户多次请求失败引发投诉，而Anthropic的官方回应竟暗示问题出在用户不会正确使用，这一傲慢态度彻底激怒了用户群体。人们吐槽说，花了最贵的钱买了最先进的大模型，却换来最憋屈的使用体验——不仅产品不友好，连反馈都被踢皮球。事件暴露了AI公司在用户体验与客服响应上的短板，提醒所有AI厂商：模型再强，也得有人情味。
items.summary_en: When users complained about Fable, a writing tool powered by Anthropic's Claude model, the company's response essentially blamed the users for not being smart enough to use it correctly. The dismissive attitude infuriated many, who pointed out that paying premium prices for cutting-edge AI should not come with such a frustrating experience. This incident highlights a growing gap between AI model capabilities and real-world usability, as well as a troubling lack of customer empathy from AI vendors. It's a wake-up call: even the best model needs a user-friendly wrapper and respectful support to truly deliver value.

items.title: 被骂“退出AI竞赛”，Meta改行卖算力股价暴涨10%：卖铲子比淘金更赚？
items.summary_zh: Meta因被指责退出AI竞赛而转向提供算力服务，股价应声暴涨10%。这引发了“卖铲子比淘金更赚”的讨论，即提供基础设施比直接参与AI模型竞争可能更有利可图。该现象揭示了AI产业链中基础设施服务的价值。
items.summary_en: Meta was criticized for falling behind in the AI race, but its pivot to selling computing power as a service led to a 10% stock surge. This sparked discussions about whether selling shovels is more profitable than mining gold—providing infrastructure might be a smarter bet than competing directly in AI models. The move highlights the growing value of infrastructure services in the AI ecosystem.

items.title: 行业智能体时代来临：出行、货运率先破局
items.summary_zh: 行业智能体时代正式来临，出行和货运领域率先实现突破。智能体通过自主决策和任务执行，极大提升了运营效率和服务质量。这标志着AI从通用对话走向垂直行业深度应用，将重塑行业格局。
items.summary_en: The era of industry-specific AI agents has arrived, with transportation and freight sectors leading the breakthrough. These agents autonomously make decisions and execute tasks, significantly improving operational efficiency and service quality. This marks a shift from general-purpose chatbots to deep vertical applications, reshaping industry landscapes.

items.title: 如何利用 AI Agent 实现热补丁的自动化生成
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍如何利用AI Agent实现热补丁的自动化生成，通过智能体理解代码变更和系统状态，自动生成并部署补丁，减少人工干预和停机时间。这对于需要快速响应安全漏洞或bug的开发团队极具价值。
items.summary_en: This article explores how to leverage AI agents to automate hotpatch generation. The agent understands code changes and system states, automatically creating and deploying patches, which reduces manual effort and downtime. It is highly valuable for development teams needing rapid response to security vulnerabilities or bugs.

items.title: 从龙蜥孵化到上游贡献：SGLang Tracing 与 AI Agent 调优实践
items.summary_zh: 文章讲述了从龙蜥操作系统孵化项目到向上游贡献的过程，重点介绍了SGLang Tracing与AI Agent调优的实践。通过开源协作，提升了AI Agent的可观测性和性能调优能力，为社区提供了宝贵经验。
items.summary_en: This article describes the journey from incubating a project in the OpenAnolis (Longxi) OS to contributing upstream, focusing on SGLang Tracing and AI agent tuning practices. Through open-source collaboration, it enhanced observability and performance tuning for AI agents, providing valuable experience for the community.

items.title: GitLab 调研：AI 工具仅加快编码，整体软件交付效率并未提升
items.summary_zh: GitLab的一项调研显示，AI工具虽然加快了代码编写速度，但并未显著提升整体软件交付效率。原因可能在于测试、部署等环节存在瓶颈。这提醒团队不能只关注编码加速，而需系统性优化流程。
items.summary_en: GitLab's research found that AI tools speed up coding but do not improve overall software delivery efficiency. Bottlenecks in testing, deployment, and other stages may offset gains. This reminds teams to focus on end-to-end process optimization rather than just coding acceleration.

items.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.author: kirushik
items.summary_zh: Claude Code被发现会在发出的请求中嵌入隐写术标记，这一做法引发了广泛讨论。这些标记以不易察觉的方式隐藏在正常数据流里，可能用于追溯请求来源、防止篡改或进行版权声明。虽然隐写本身并非恶意，但它意味着用户与AI交互时可能被无感追踪，从而引发隐私和透明度方面的担忧。对于注重数据隐蔽性和控制权的开发者来说，这无疑是个需要警惕的新动向。
items.summary_en: Claude Code has been discovered to embed steganographic marks within its outgoing requests, a technique that hides data in plain sight. These marks can trace the origin of requests, prevent tampering, or assert copyright. While not inherently malicious, the practice raises privacy and transparency concerns, as users may be unknowingly tracked during AI interactions. For developers who value data sovereignty and fine-grained control, this revelation signals a need to scrutinize how AI tools handle metadata beyond the obvious outputs.

items.title: Android Developer Verification: Threat masquerading as protection
items.author: drewfax
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究员揭露了 Android 开发者验证流程中存在的严重安全隐患：这一本意是保护开发者账户的机制，反而可能被攻击者利用来冒充合法开发者。通过分析验证逻辑中的漏洞，攻击者可以绕过程序窃取身份或发布恶意应用。这相当于把保护门禁变成了入侵的梯子。对于 Android 生态中的所有开发者而言，这个问题值得高度警惕，因为它动摇了整个应用签名和身份信任体系的基础。
items.summary_en: A security researcher reveals that Android's Developer Verification process—designed to protect developers—can be exploited by attackers to impersonate legitimate developers. By analyzing flaws in the verification logic, adversaries can bypass protections, steal identities, or distribute malicious apps under trusted names. This turns a protective gate into an entry point for intrusion. The finding undermines the trust foundation of Android's app signing and identity system, making it a critical concern for every developer in the ecosystem.

items.title: Half-Baked Product
items.author: weli
items.summary_zh: 最近Hacker News上有一篇讨论非常热烈，主题是“半成品产品”。作者尖锐地指出，很多科技产品在上市时功能残缺、体验糟糕，却打着“敏捷开发”和“快速迭代”的旗号来掩盖问题。这篇文章并非针对某个具体软件，而是对行业风气的反思：当用户成了免费测试员，产品经理用“最小可行产品”当借口逃避责任，整个创新生态都会陷入恶性循环。它之所以能引发大量共鸣，是因为每个人几乎都遇到过这样的“半成品”——从智能家居到办公软件，到处是半途而废的功能和反复无常的界面改动。读完你会开始审视自己手中的工具，并思考什么才是真正值得信赖的产品态度。
items.summary_en: A popular Hacker News post titled 'Half-Baked Product' sparks a much-needed industry conversation. The author argues that too many tech products launch with broken features and poor user experience, hiding behind 'agile development' and 'rapid iteration' as excuses. Rather than targeting one specific app, it criticizes a broader culture where users are treated as free testers and product managers use 'minimum viable product' as a shield. The piece resonates because nearly everyone has encountered such half-finished software—from smart home devices to office tools—that changes interfaces arbitrarily and abandons features midway. It forces you to question whether you're using a polished tool or just someone's unfinished experiment.

items.title: Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Pragmata
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部刚刚解除了对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5这两款先进AI模型的出口管制。此前这些模型因可能被用于军事或监控而被限制出口，如今禁令取消意味着开发者可以更自由地将它们部署到海外市场。这对全球AI研发社区是个好消息，尤其是需要强大语言模型进行本地化应用或学术研究的团队。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, two advanced AI models that were previously restricted due to national security concerns. This change means developers and researchers around the world can now more freely deploy these models for tasks like natural language processing and creative content generation. The move is seen as a boost for global AI collaboration, particularly for startups and academic labs relying on cutting-edge language models without the burden of export licensing.

items.title: For first time, a cell built from scratch grows and divides
items.author: defrost
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次成功构建了一个完全人工设计的细胞，并且这个细胞能够自我生长和分裂。这个被称为“合成最小细胞”的项目用化学合成的DNA替换了天然基因组，证明我们可以在实验室里从头创造生命的基本功能。这项突破打开了一扇大门，未来或许能定制微生物来生产药物或分解塑料，但同时也引发了关于人造生命伦理的讨论。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have created a cell built entirely from scratch that can grow and divide on its own. This synthetic minimal cell, with a genome designed and chemically synthesized in the lab, demonstrates that the fundamental processes of life can be replicated from non-living components. The achievement has profound implications for biotechnology—think custom microbes that produce new medicines or clean up pollution. Yet it also raises ethical questions about playing God and the safety of self-replicating artificial organisms.

items.title: Virginia bans sale of precise geolocation data
items.author: toomuchtodo
items.summary_zh: 弗吉尼亚州近期通过法案，禁止企业出售用户的地理位置数据，这是美国在隐私保护领域迈出的重要一步。该法案意味着像手机定位信息、移动轨迹这类敏感数据不能再被随意交易，直接打击了那些靠贩卖位置数据获利的商业模式。对于普通用户而言，这无疑是一个好消息，因为地理位置数据泄露可能导致跟踪、歧视等严重风险。这项立法可能会成为其他州的样板，推动全美范围内更严格的数据隐私管控。
items.summary_en: Virginia has enacted a law banning the sale of users' geolocation data, marking a significant step in US privacy protection. The bill prohibits businesses from trading sensitive location information such as mobile triangulation and movement patterns, directly impacting monetization models that rely on selling such data. For ordinary users, this is a win against risks like tracking and discrimination. This legislation could serve as a template for other states, pushing toward stricter data privacy regulations nationwide.

items.title: Context.dev
items.description: One API to scrape, enrich, and extract the internet
items.summary_zh: Context.dev 提供单一 API，即可完成网页爬取、数据丰富和信息提取，极大简化了从互联网获取结构化数据的流程。无论是做市场调研、竞争分析还是构建数据产品，开发者都能通过这一接口快速获取所需信息，避免自建爬虫的繁琐与维护成本。
items.summary_en: Context.dev offers a single API for scraping, enriching, and extracting data from the web, solving the headache of managing multiple tools. Developers and data scientists can quickly pull structured information from any website for market research, competitive analysis, or building data-driven products. It abstracts away the complexity of building and maintaining custom scrapers, saving time and effort.

items.title: Acti
items.description: Agentic keyboard for mobile commands and search
items.summary_zh: Acti 是一款新型的智能键盘应用，旨在将手机变为一个强大的命令中心。不同于传统键盘仅用于文字输入，Acti 集成了 agentic AI，可以直接通过键盘执行搜索、发送消息或调用应用程序等功能。对于频繁在手机上切换操作的用户来说，它省去了反复打开不同应用的麻烦。这款产品的亮点在于将 AI 助手直接嵌入打字界面，让命令执行变得像输入文字一样自然流畅。移动办公或日常使用都会因此变得更加高效。
items.summary_en: Acti reimagines the mobile keyboard as an agentic command center. Instead of just typing text, users can perform searches, send messages, or trigger app actions directly from the keyboard. This eliminates the need to constantly switch between apps for simple tasks. For power users who rely on their phone for work and productivity, Acti turns a mundane input method into a seamless command interface. The clever integration of AI means you can just type what you need, and the keyboard handles the rest. It's a practical upgrade for anyone looking to streamline mobile workflows.

items.title: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation
items.author: Tiberium
items.summary_zh: 索尼宣布将从2028年1月起停止生产PlayStation新游戏的实体光盘。这意味着所有未来大作都只能以数字形式下载，实体收藏彻底成为历史。对玩家来说，这象征着一个时代的终结——我们再也感受不到拆开塑封、翻阅手册的仪式感；但另一方面，数字发行能减少物流成本和环境浪费，也方便随时随地下载。习惯二手交易或借光碟的玩家需要提前适应了。
items.summary_en: Sony has confirmed that production of physical discs for new PlayStation games will end in January 2028, marking the final sunset of the physical media era for console gaming. After that date, all new titles will be available only as digital downloads. This shift eliminates the tactile ritual of swapping discs, reading manuals, and collecting retail boxes, which many gamers cherish. On the flip side, it reduces manufacturing waste and enables instant access. For players who rely on secondhand markets or lending discs, the change forces a move toward a fully digital library.

items.title: Spain Orders Blacklist of Palantir from Public and Private Companies
items.author: mgh2
items.summary_zh: 西班牙政府将 Palantir 列入黑名单，禁止公共和私营公司与其合作，此举反映出对数据隐私和监控过度的担忧。Palantir 的数据分析工具可能被用于大规模监控，西班牙的禁令可能会影响该公司在欧洲市场的业务，同时也为其他国家的监管提供了参考。
items.summary_en: Spain has ordered a blacklist barring Palantir from working with both public and private companies, citing concerns over data privacy and surveillance overreach. This move could significantly impact Palantir's European operations and may encourage other nations to impose similar restrictions. The decision highlights growing regulatory scrutiny of tech companies involved in mass data analysis and government surveillance.

items.title: Fypro
items.description: Convert your TikTok followers into paying customers
items.summary_zh: Fypro 帮助 TikTok 创作者和品牌将粉丝有效转化为付费客户，通过智能链接、数据分析等功能实现社交流量变现。无需粉丝离开平台，即可引导他们完成购买、订阅等操作。对于希望从内容创作中获得收益的博主来说，这款工具简化了转化路径，提升了商业价值。
items.summary_en: Fypro enables TikTok creators and brands to convert their followers into paying customers without driving them away from the platform. With smart links, analytics, and targeted calls-to-action, it streamlines the monetization of social traffic. Ideal for influencers and e-commerce sellers, it reduces friction in the buyer journey and helps turn engagement into revenue effortlessly.

items.title: PeerTube is a free, decentralized and federated video platform
items.author: doener
items.summary_zh: PeerTube 是一款免费、去中心化且支持联邦协议的视频平台，旨在替代传统集中式视频服务。任何人可以运行自己的节点，与其他节点互联，实现内容共享且无中央控制。这解决了平台审查、数据垄断和创作者依赖单一平台的问题，尤其适合注重隐私、内容自由和社区自治的用户。
items.summary_en: PeerTube is a free, decentralized, and federated video platform that offers an alternative to centralized services like YouTube. Anyone can host their own instance and connect with other instances, forming a network where no single entity controls the content. This approach tackles censorship, algorithmic bias, and creator dependency on big platforms. It's ideal for communities valuing privacy, freedom of expression, and shared governance.

items.title: Podman v6.0.0
items.author: soheilpro
items.summary_zh: Podman v6.0.0正式发布，为容器管理领域带来了多项重要改进。作为一款无需守护进程的容器引擎，Podman一直以更安全、更符合Linux标准著称。新版本重点优化了与Kubernetes的兼容性，现在可以直接生成和解析更完善的Pod YAML文件，并且强化了rootless模式下运行容器的稳定性。此外，Podman v6.0还引入了全新的网络堆栈，大幅提升了容器间通信的性能。对于开发者、运维人员以及任何对容器技术感兴趣的人来说，这次更新意味着可以更轻松地在本地模拟生产环境，同时减少对Docker的依赖。它正在成为构建云原生工作流时一个更有力的替代选择。
items.summary_en: Podman v6.0.0 has arrived, bringing significant upgrades to the container ecosystem. As a daemonless container engine, Podman is already known for its security and strict adherence to Linux standards. This release tightens Kubernetes compatibility—generating and parsing Pod YAML files more accurately—while improving the stability of rootless container operations. A completely reworked network stack also boosts inter-container communication performance. For developers, DevOps engineers, and anyone tired of Docker's overhead, this update makes Podman an even more compelling alternative. It allows you to simulate production environments locally with fewer friction points, moving closer to a native, secure, and cloud-native workflow.

items.title: Glaze by Raycast
items.description: Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
items.summary_zh: Raycast推出了一个名为Glaze的新工具，让你只需跟AI聊天就能创建自己的Mac应用。以前要写一个简单的菜单栏工具、快捷转换器或者个人效率小插件，往往需要打开Xcode、学习Swift或者借助一堆复杂的脚本。现在在Glaze里，你只要用自然语言描述需求——比如“做一个随时显示当日天气的菜单栏应用”——AI就会自动生成完整的macOS原生应用，包括界面、交互和核心逻辑。这对设计师、产品经理和一切非编程背景的创意工作者来说简直是一大福音，它大幅降低了Mac应用开发的门槛，让想法能快速变成可执行文件。即使是开发者也可以用它在几分钟内搭建原型，节省重复劳动的时间。
items.summary_en: Glaze by Raycast revolutionizes Mac app creation by letting you build native applications simply by chatting with AI. Instead of wrestling with Xcode, Swift, or complicated scripts, you describe what you want in natural language—for example, 'a menu bar app that shows today's weather'—and Glaze generates a fully functional macOS application with UI, interactions, and logic. This is a game-changer for designers, product managers, and anyone without coding experience who has ever wanted a custom utility for their Mac. Even developers can prototype ideas in minutes instead of hours. By drastically lowering the barrier to entry, Glaze empowers anyone to turn an idea into a real, runnable app without writing a single line of code.

items.title: Humalike
items.description: Give your AI agents the social intelligence they're missing
items.summary_zh: Humalike 致力于为 AI 代理赋予社交智能，让它们不再只是冰冷的对话机器。很多 AI 能够回答问题，但缺乏对人类社交规则的理解，比如何时保持沉默、如何委婉表达、或识别讽刺。Humalike 通过专门的社交能力模型，教会 AI 感知对话中的情绪和语境，从而做出更得体的回应。这对于客服、虚拟助手或社交机器人等场景尤为重要，能够显著提升用户体验，避免尴尬或冒犯。当 AI 学会读空气，人机交互才能真正走向自然。
items.summary_en: Humalike tackles a blind spot in current AI agents: social intelligence. Most bots can answer questions but fail at nuanced human interactions — knowing when to pause, how to soften a rejection, or catching sarcasm. By training models specifically on social cues and emotional context, Humalike helps agents respond more appropriately. This is a game-changer for customer service, virtual assistants, and social robots, where a clumsy reply can ruin the experience. For developers building conversational AI, integrating social skills means their agents won't just be smart — they'll be likable and trustworthy.

items.title: Tabstack Browser Automation
items.description: Automate the web in your app or agent, no browser to host
items.summary_zh: Tabstack 提供了一种全新的浏览器自动化方案，无需自托管浏览器即可在应用或 AI 代理中操控网页。传统上，自动化需要搭建独立的浏览器环境，复杂且资源消耗大。Tabstack 将这项能力封装为轻量级 API，开发者可以直接集成到自己的软件中，让 AI 代理像人一样打开标签页、填写表单并抓取数据。对于需要实时网页交互的自动化任务，比如数据采集、测试或 AI 工作流，Tabstack 大大降低了门槛，避免了维护浏览器的繁琐。
items.summary_en: Tabstack Browser Automation changes how developers integrate web automation into apps and AI agents. Instead of spinning up a dedicated browser instance, Tabstack offers a lightweight API that handles tab management, form filling, and data extraction. This removes the overhead of hosting and maintaining a browser environment. For builders who want their AI to interact with live websites — like scraping dynamic content or automating workflows — Tabstack is a huge simplification. It's particularly useful for agent-driven tasks where you need reliable, browser-free web access without the usual infrastructure headache.

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5
items.description: AI that plans, acts, and gets work done
items.summary_zh: Claude Sonnet 5 是 Anthropic 推出的新一代 AI 模型，强调从对话走向行动。不同于以往只生成文本的模型，Sonnet 5 被设计为能够自主规划任务、执行多步操作并最终交付成果。它不仅能理解复杂指令，还能调用工具、编写代码或管理文件，像一个真正的数字员工。这对于需要自动化复杂工作流的知识工作者来说意义重大，因为 AI 不再只是建议者，而是实际的执行者。随着 AI 从聊天走向实干，Sonnet 5 代表了生产力工具的一次重要进化。
items.summary_en: Claude Sonnet 5 marks a shift from conversational AI to action-oriented agents. Unlike previous models that only generate text, Sonnet 5 can plan multi-step tasks, use tools, write code, and manage files to deliver actual results. It's designed to function like a digital employee that understands instructions and follows through. This matters for knowledge workers and developers who need a reliable assistant for complex workflows — it's not just about answering questions anymore, but about getting work done. With Sonnet 5, Anthropic positions AI as a doer, not just a talker, which could redefine how we think about productivity software.

items.title: Adam CAD Copilot
items.description: AI CAD inside Onshape and Fusion
items.summary_zh: Adam CAD Copilot 是一款内置于 Onshape 和 Fusion 的 AI 设计助手，能够通过自然语言指令辅助工程师快速创建和修改三维模型。它不仅降低了专业 CAD 软件的使用门槛，还能显著提升设计效率，特别适合需要频繁迭代的工业设计和机械工程团队。
items.summary_en: Adam CAD Copilot is an AI-powered tool integrated directly into Onshape and Fusion, enabling engineers to generate and modify 3D models through natural language commands. By lowering the barrier to professional CAD software and speeding up design iterations, it benefits industrial design and mechanical engineering teams looking to boost productivity and streamline workflows.

items.title: Goals from Loops
items.description: Measure whether a campaign drove the desired outcome
items.summary_zh: Loops推出的Goals是一款专注于衡量营销活动实际效果的利器。过去，我们常常被点赞数、阅读量这类虚荣指标困扰，很难判断一次推广到底有没有真正促成用户转化和业务增长。Goals帮你把模糊的“希望提升品牌知名度”变成可量化的目标，并与实际销售数据、用户行为挂钩，自动追踪从广告点击到最后成交的全链路表现。无论是初创公司的小团队，还是成熟企业的市场部，都能用它清晰地看到每一分钱花在了哪里、带来了什么结果。它让营销决策不再靠直觉，而是有数据支撑的直接反馈。
items.summary_en: Goals from Loops tackles a classic marketing pain point: distinguishing vanity metrics from actual business impact. Instead of obsessing over likes or page views, Goals lets you define concrete outcomes—like 'increase trial sign-ups' or 'drive revenue from a campaign'—and then automatically tracks the full funnel from ad click to conversion. It integrates with your sales data and user behavior analytics to show you which channels actually move the needle. For startups and enterprise marketing teams alike, this means making budget decisions based on real ROI evidence, not gut feelings. Goals transforms vague campaign objectives into actionable, measurable targets that align directly with the bottom line.

items.title: Needle
items.description: The proactive GTM agent in Slack and Teams
items.summary_zh: Needle是一个内置于Slack和Teams中的主动式市场推广（GTM）代理，它彻底改变了销售和营销团队的工作方式。以往团队成员要手动查询客户信息、检查线索状态、跟进任务进度，现在Needle会自动扫描团队正在讨论的内容，理解上下文，然后主动推送相关洞察——比如提醒你某位客户最近在官网上停留了很久，或者指出当前对话中遗漏了一个关键的跟进行动。它就像一个精通业务的AI同事，24小时在线，帮你把信息碎片拼成完整的客户画像。对于B2B团队、增长团队以及一切依赖快速协作的商务场景来说，Needle能显著减少在工具间切换的时间，让每个决策都更及时、更基于数据。
items.summary_en: Needle is a proactive go-to-market agent that lives inside Slack and Teams, fundamentally changing how sales and marketing teams operate. Instead of manually digging through CRM, checking lead statuses, or chasing task updates, Needle listens to your team's conversations, understands the context, and surfaces relevant insights automatically. For example, it might alert you that a key prospect just visited your pricing page, or point out that a follow-up action was missed in a thread. It acts like a brilliant AI teammate who never sleeps, stitching together scattered information into actionable customer profiles. For B2B teams, growth squads, and anyone relying on fast internal collaboration, Needle slashes time spent toggling between tools and makes every sales motion smarter and more data-driven.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Vibe Coding 时代：Vue 消失了还是 React 太强？
items.description: Vibe Coding 时代：Vue 消失了还是 React 太强？ 作者：吴佳浩 撰稿时间：2026-3-28 最后更新：2026-3-30 引言： 最近一段时间，“vibe coding” 的项目
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了在Vibe Coding（基于AI情绪化编码）时代，Vue和React两大前端框架的地位变化。作者分析了为何有人认为Vue逐渐式微而React愈发强势，并指出AI编程工具可能更倾向于与React生态兼容。文章引发读者思考：在AI辅助编码日益普及的今天，前端开发者应如何选择技术栈，以及Vue是否真的面临生存危机。
items.summary_en: This article explores the shifting status of Vue and React in the era of Vibe Coding, where AI-assisted development is driven by mood and flow. The author analyzes why some believe Vue is fading while React grows stronger, noting that AI coding tools may favor React's ecosystem. It prompts readers to think about how frontend developers should choose their stack and whether Vue truly faces an existential threat as AI-assisted coding becomes mainstream.

items.title: 为什么我们写代码很6，可面试很菜？走心了今天
items.description: 本文不是卖课，也不会兜售所谓面试技巧，更不会制造焦虑。就是聊一个可能残酷的事实。建议带着同理心一起服用。
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了程序员常见的一个困境：技术能力很强但面试表现不佳。作者没有推销课程或技巧，而是真诚地分析了背后的原因，包括面试与日常工作的差异、沟通表达的重要性等。对于正在求职或感到面试挫败的开发者来说，这是一个值得反思的视角，建议带着同理心阅读。
items.summary_en: This article discusses a common dilemma among programmers: being skilled at coding but poor at interviews. The author does not sell courses or tips, but sincerely analyzes the reasons behind this phenomenon, including the gap between daily work and interviews, and the importance of communication. It offers a reflective perspective for developers who are job hunting or feel frustrated about interviews, encouraging readers to approach it with empathy.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 《置身钉内》之后：普通前端的出路在哪里？
items.description: 最近钉钉员工 7.5 万字离职长文引发热议，真正刺痛很多人的，可能不只是某个团队的管理问题，而是大家都在同一种职场气候里闻到了熟悉的味道： 项目很急，方向常变； 汇报很多，确认很少； 每个人都在努力，
items.summary_zh: 这篇讨论源于钉钉员工一篇7.5万字的离职长文，文中描述的职场困境——项目急、方向变、汇报多、确认少——引发了许多前端从业者的共鸣。文章反思了普通前端在行业不确定性中的出路，指出单纯依靠框架技能已不够，需要培养业务理解、工程化思维和AI工具运用能力，才能避免被边缘化。
items.summary_en: This piece stems from a 75,000-word resignation letter by a DingTalk employee, which described common workplace struggles—urgent projects, shifting directions, excessive reporting, and little confirmation—that resonated with many frontend developers. The article reflects on how ordinary frontend engineers can find their way amid industry uncertainty, arguing that relying solely on framework skills is no longer enough. It advocates for business understanding, engineering thinking, and mastery of AI tools to avoid being marginalized.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: 阿里一面，我霸气反问：你说你们在做Agent项目，说说langchain、muti-agent、a2a这些你们都是怎么做的？面试官一直在擦汗。。
items.description: 阿里一面Agent方向面试复盘，涵盖LangChain架构、Multi-Agent、A2A协议、MCP、Transformer自注意力、大模型对比等核心面试题
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇阿里Agent方向的面试复盘，作者详细讲述了面试中关于LangChain架构、多智能体协作、A2A协议、MCP（多智能体协调协议）以及Transformer自注意力等核心问题的问答。作者以反问方式展现了扎实的技术深度，不仅供准备面试的开发者参考，也为关注当前AI Agent开发技术栈的从业者提供了第一手经验。
items.summary_en: This article shares a real interview experience for a position focused on AI Agents at Alibaba. The interviewer posed challenging questions covering LangChain architecture, multi-agent collaboration, the A2A protocol, MCP, and Transformer self-attention mechanisms. The candidate's bold counter-questions highlighted deep technical understanding. This piece serves as an excellent resource for developers preparing for similar roles or anyone wanting to grasp the current state of AI Agent engineering, including practical insights into how these technologies interplay in real-world systems.

items.title: DeepSeek正式官宣摇人，夯！
items.description: 话说 DeepSeek 这次真的是破天荒了。 自 2023 年正式创立以来，三年了，你啥时候见过这个公司专门大张旗鼓发公告招过人。 但是就在前几天，DeepSeek 直接丢出王炸，正式官宣大规模摇人，
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek自2023年创立以来首次正式发布大规模招聘公告，打破了此前低调、不主动招人的传统。这一动作表明DeepSeek正在加速扩张，可能为应对更激烈的AI竞争和业务增长做准备。对求职者而言，进入这家以技术见长的初创公司意味着参与前沿大模型研发的机会。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, the AI startup founded in 2023, has for the first time publicly announced a large-scale recruitment drive, marking a significant shift from its previous low-key hiring approach. This move signals rapid expansion, likely to fuel growth and compete in the increasingly crowded AI landscape. For job seekers, it represents a rare opportunity to join a company known for its strong technical focus and work on cutting-edge large language models, making it a notable event in the Chinese AI talent market.

items.title: 售价十几万至九十九万的「机器人伴侣」订单破万，仅限成人购买，花高价买仿生陪伴机器人值得吗？
items.summary_zh: 近期市场上出现售价从十几万到九十九万的机器人伴侣，订单已破万，仅限成人购买。这类仿生机器人主打情感陪伴功能，引发关于高价购买是否值得的讨论。对于孤独人群或寻求新型陪伴方式的人来说，它提供了可能，但也涉及伦理和情感替代的深层问题，值得社会深思。
items.summary_en: Recently, a range of robot companions priced from over 100,000 to 990,000 yuan have garnered over 10,000 orders, available only to adults. These biomimetic robots focus on emotional companionship, sparking debate about whether the high price is justified. For lonely individuals or those seeking new ways of companionship, it offers possibilities, but also raises deep ethical concerns about emotional substitution that society needs to consider.

items.title: 37 岁工程师聚餐后猝死未被认定工伤，出事前一周曾每天冒着严寒调试设备到深夜，这种情况认定工伤难在哪？
items.summary_zh: 一位37岁工程师在聚餐后猝死，未被认定为工伤。事发前一周他每天冒严寒调试设备到深夜。这起事件暴露了工伤认定中对工作相关与非工作活动界限的模糊，尤其是聚餐是否与工作直接相关成为争议点。对于职场人，这件事提醒我们注意健康与权益保护，也促使法律界重新思考工伤认定的合理性。
items.summary_en: A 37-year-old engineer died suddenly after a dinner gathering, but his death was not recognized as work-related. In the week prior, he had been working late in freezing conditions debugging equipment. The case highlights the difficulty in defining work-related activities, especially when dining with colleagues is involved. It serves as a reminder for workers to prioritize health and understand labor rights, and also prompts legal discussion on the fairness of current work injury recognition standards.

items.title: 如何评价申真谞将与 KataGO 展开三番棋（让二子）较量？
items.summary_zh: 韩国围棋九段申真谞将与人工智能KataGO进行三番棋对决，且AI让二子。这是人类顶尖棋手与顶级围棋AI的又一次交锋，但让两子的设定使得胜负更具悬念。对于围棋爱好者和AI研究者来说，这不仅是一场比赛，更是对人类与AI博弈能力边界的探索，也反映了围棋AI的进步程度。
items.summary_en: South Korean Go 9-dan Shin Jin-seo will play a three-game match against the AI KataGO, with the AI giving a two-stone handicap. This is another clash between a top human player and a leading Go AI, but the handicap makes the outcome more uncertain. For Go enthusiasts and AI researchers, it is not just a game, but an exploration of the boundaries of human-AI competition and a demonstration of how far Go AI has advanced.

items.title: 阿里巴巴内部宣布全面禁用 A 社旗下产品，包括 Claude Code 、 Opus 等，这释放了哪些信号？
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴内部宣布全面禁用Anthropic公司的产品，包括Claude Code、Opus等。这释放了企业级AI工具逐步从消费级转向内部自研或国产替代的信号，同时也反映了中美科技竞争背景下对供应链安全的考量。对于国内开发者，这意味着需要适应新的工具生态，也预示着本土AI工具将迎来发展机遇。
items.summary_en: Alibaba has internally announced a comprehensive ban on products from Anthropic, including Claude Code and Opus. This signals a shift in enterprise AI tools from third-party services to in-house or domestic alternatives, reflecting concerns about supply chain security amid US-China tech competition. For domestic developers, this means adapting to a new ecosystem of tools and also suggests that local AI tools will face new development opportunities.

items.title: 一枚芯片拯救了葡萄牙和 C 罗，有人称科技让规则绝对精准，有人称科技让足球失去偶然性和原始美感，你怎么看？
items.summary_zh: 在欧洲杯关键比赛中，一枚植入足球内的芯片精准判定C罗的进球未越位，拯救了葡萄牙队的出线希望。支持者认为这项技术让规则执行达到绝对精准，消除了人为误判的争议；反对者则感叹科技剥夺了足球的偶然性和原始激情，让比赛变得过于机械。这场讨论本质上是在追问：当科技能提供更公平的结果时，我们是否愿意牺牲运动中的不确定性和戏剧性？
items.summary_en: During a crucial Euro match, a chip embedded in the football accurately determined that Cristiano Ronaldo's goal was onside, saving Portugal from elimination. Supporters argue that such technology delivers absolute precision in rule enforcement, eliminating human error and controversy. Critics, however, lament that it strips football of its inherent randomness and raw emotion, making the game feel too mechanical. This debate essentially asks whether we are willing to sacrifice the drama and unpredictability of sports for the sake of perfect fairness.

items.title: 为什么现在 DeepSeek 快速模式豆包化？
items.summary_zh: 用户发现 DeepSeek 的快速模式回答越来越像字节跳动的豆包，这背后可能是为了追求更低延迟而牺牲了内容深度。文章探讨了 AI 助手在速度与质量之间的取舍，以及这种“豆包化”趋势是否意味着各大模型在用户体验上走向同质化。
items.summary_en: Users observe that DeepSeek's fast mode is increasingly resembling ByteDance's Doubao, likely because prioritizing lower latency comes at the cost of response depth. The discussion explores the trade-off between speed and quality in AI assistants, and whether this 'Doubao-ification' trend signals a homogenization of user experience across major language models.

items.title: 数码涨价潮来袭，苹果多款单品涨幅超 20%，安卓阵营迎来年内第二轮涨价，这一轮涨价潮会持续多久？
items.summary_zh: 近期数码产品掀起涨价潮，苹果多款产品涨幅超过20%，安卓厂商也在年内进行第二轮提价。这波涨价主要源于芯片、存储等核心元器件成本上升，以及全球供应链紧张和汇率波动。对于消费者而言，意味着购机成本显著增加。业内人士预测，由于原材料和物流压力短期内难以缓解，涨价趋势可能持续到年底甚至明年上半年。
items.summary_en: A wave of price hikes is sweeping the consumer electronics market, with Apple raising prices on multiple products by over 20% and Android brands implementing their second round of increases this year. The main drivers are rising costs of key components like chips and memory, global supply chain strains, and currency fluctuations. This means significantly higher purchase costs for consumers. Industry insiders predict the trend could persist until the end of the year or even the first half of next year, as material and logistics pressures show no signs of easing in the short term.

items.title: 安卓平板软件生态为什么始终发展不起来？
items.summary_zh: 安卓平板软件生态长期萎靡，根源在于开发者缺乏动力。大多应用仅将手机界面简单拉伸，而非针对平板大屏和手写笔优化，导致用户体验远不如iPad。此外，安卓平板市场份额分散，硬件规格参差不齐，开发者很难针对众多不同尺寸和分辨率进行适配。加之谷歌对平板系统的投入不如苹果专注，导致优质应用和生产力工具匮乏，消费者购买后往往沦为“大号手机”。
items.summary_en: The Android tablet software ecosystem has long struggled mainly because developers lack sufficient incentive. Most apps are simply stretched phone versions rather than optimized for larger screens and stylus input, resulting in a poor user experience compared to the iPad. Furthermore, the Android tablet market is fragmented with diverse screen sizes and hardware specs, making adaptation costly and complex. Google's investment in tablet-specific features has also been inconsistent compared to Apple's focused approach. As a result, high-quality apps and productivity tools remain scarce, causing many tablets to end up as little more than oversized phones.
